case_title: LUISA WONG VS. KIN HIN NG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY WONG, LUISA AS TO DEFENDANT NG, KIN HIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NG, KIN HIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2008 - CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CANTONESE INTERPRETER REQUESTED PER THE COURT TO ASSIST THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NG, KIN HIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-24-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU PRESENT ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, LUISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, KIN HIN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.94 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,185.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY APPELLANT NG, KIN HIN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2008 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2008 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON NOV-19-2008 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 303. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: DONNA LOK; REPORTER: PAULA SHI, CSR #13358 (206)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON NOV-19-2008 OFF CALENDAR - FROM THE SWORN TESTIMONY OF THE PARTIES THE COURT FINDS THAT THE CONTRACT ARISES FROM AN ILLEGAL ACTIVITY (TRANSFER OF A GAMBLING HOUSE). THEREFORE, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT, KIN NG AND AND AGAINST RESPONDENT LUISA WONG. JUDGE: JULIE TANG; CLERK: DON FEINBERG (PROCEEDINGS WERE NOT REPORTED).
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT NG, KIN HIN TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT WONG, LUISA NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
